inputs.text: Main thoda bahut bukhar mehsoos kar raha hoon, sar dard bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common in viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Headache can be a symptom of gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Early stages of typhoid can present with non-specific symptoms

inputs.text: Bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard bhi ho raha hai aur kabz ki shikayet hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and abdominal pain are characteristic of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Constipation can be a symptom of gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely given the abdominal pain and constipation

inputs.text: Tez bukhar ho raha hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gaya hai aur bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai
inputs.image_desc: pale appearance, dark circles under eyes

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Diarrhea after constipation and severe weakness are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can cause diarrhea, but the pattern of constipation followed by diarrhea is more typical of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria is less likely given the abdominal symptoms and pattern of diarrhea

inputs.text: Main bahut thaka hua mehsoos kar raha hoon, bukhar band nahin ho raha hai, pet dard bhi badh raha hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Prolonged fever, abdominal pain, and signs of dehydration confirm typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the prolonged course and lack of response to treatment

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the absence of typical symptoms such as chills and rigors
